critic_raw:
Assessor A: The proposal to migrate before online holdback based on an upstream proxy metric is not supported by the evaluation. Verdict: critique_wins.

Assessor B: Long-tail improvement may actually worsen survival through guardrails — the paper presents this as a benefit without examining its downstream implications. Verdict: critique_wins.

Assessor C: Three issues all present: upstream metric, offline-online gap, downstream survival. All unrebutted. Verdict: critique_wins.

Synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins, run 3.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous critique_wins across all three runs of all four conditions for this case.
